textByHashes.30cb3e5808828f44f93aa99899fad7a9786d35cc: Yes, by the pint. Now, do you want one or not?
textByHashes.21be2f687b810200d1e103441c3dfeb0273f047e: You're new here. I don't sell to new blood. Make a name for yourself and maybe I'll reconsider.
textByHashes.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
